entries.statement: Assign a single move owner. Submit pet paperwork immediately. Confirm elevator slot and mover quote. Target a mid-month move with a storage plan for the couch only if painter timing slips.

basis.intent: Confirm a workable move date window
supporting_evidence: Partner visa renewal appointment is the week before the preferred move
Overlap rent for 12th–30th is straining the budget
assumptions_relied_on: Pet paperwork can clear before move-in if submitted immediately
Movers will hold a cancellable slot once elevator time is confirmed
risks_addressed: Unclear ownership could leave utilities or address changes undone
risks_accepted: Painter slip could force storage costs or overlap rent extension
constraints_respected: New lease starts the 12th; old lease ends the 30th
Building requires pet registration before keys
tradeoffs: Mid-month move reduces painter risk but increases overlap rent
alternatives_considered: Delay move to the 22nd to reduce overlap but risk visa timing and painter slip

would_change_if: If painters confirm they will not finish by the 10th, forcing storage regardless of move date.
If the visa outcome is delayed past the preferred move window.

entries.statement: Name one owner for the move checklist today

basis.intent: Assign clear owners for utilities, address changes, and mover booking
risks_addressed: Unclear ownership could leave utilities or address changes undone

would_change_if: If both partners cannot agree on an owner today.

entries.statement: Submit pet records and deposit to building management

basis.intent: Meet building pet and lease requirements before keys
supporting_evidence: Building stated keys depend on pet deposit and registration
assumptions_relied_on: Pet paperwork can clear before move-in if submitted immediately
constraints_respected: Building requires pet registration before keys
missing_context_caveats: Confirmed pet approval timeline from building management

would_change_if: If building management confirms pet approval will take longer than the move date allows.

entries.statement: Request elevator slot and locked mover quote with cancellation terms

basis.intent: Stay within a $4–5k mover and deposit budget
supporting_evidence: Movers quoted extra if hoist is required for the small freight elevator
risks_addressed: Elevator hoist surcharge could blow the mover budget
constraints_respected: Freight elevator slot must be confirmed before mover booking
missing_context_caveats: Final mover quote with elevator constraints

would_change_if: If the locked mover quote exceeds the $4–5k budget once the hoist surcharge is included.

entries.statement: Decide sell-vs-store for the couch once storage cost is known

basis.intent: Stay within a $4–5k mover and deposit budget
tradeoffs: Selling the couch saves storage cost but removes fallback furniture

would_change_if: If storage cost comes back low enough to make keeping the couch affordable.

entries.statement: Hold a 30-minute sequencing review after visa appointment

basis.intent: Confirm a workable move date window
supporting_evidence: Partner visa renewal appointment is the week before the preferred move
risks_accepted: Visa delay could block lease signing in both names and utility setup

would_change_if: If the visa appointment outcome is delayed past the planned review date.
